content:
A Baccarat game is a game of pure chance and is one of the most exciting table games of all time. If you are new to the online casino landscape and want to try out the elegant and formal moves of James Bond, this is one of the best games that you can try out, considering that it gives some of the best odds and is a slow-paced, easy game to learn.

Learn how to play a Baccarat game in simple steps from our team of professional casino experts.

Beginner’s guide: Learning how to play a Baccarat game

Baccarat is one of the most primitive games one can find in a casino. This is the reason why it is also called one of the three major classic casino games alongside Blackjack and Roulette. The game is very simple to play and requires almost no special skill to be learned. Here is all you will ever need to know to play a Baccarat game.

The card values of the Baccarat game

Aces have a card value of 1. The Kings, Queens, Jacks and Tens are all counted as 0. The other cards from 2 to 9 are counted according to their face values. No joker card is used in any Baccarat game.

A player can only attain a hand value that ranges between 0 to 9. If a player has a total that is more than 9, then, 10 is subtracted from that total.

The objective of the Baccarat game

In simple terms, a Baccarat game is a guessing game. It doesn’t require any kind of skill to play a game of Baccarat online/offline. All you have to do is choose the winning hand between the banker or the player. The hand whose total value is closer to 9 is called the winning hand of the game. This is one of the simplest table games but you would be shocked to know how old and popular this simple game has been over the years.

Now that you know everything about the basic steps of the game, why not try it out for real right now? Check exclusive Baccarat games from our handpicked selection of audited secure casinos and enhance your gaming journey! Gamble responsibly and have fun!History of Baccarat game

Baccarat roots its origin in ancient Italy of the 15th century. The game which is now known by several names was initially called ‘baccara’, Italian for ‘zero’. The reason this game is named before Zero is that it is one of the rare games where the value of face cards are 0. Face cards are usually the highest value cards for most other card games.

The game soon started becoming popular due to its simple gameplay and suspense. It first spread to France and England where it got its new name ‘Chemin de fer’. The game was nowhere to stop in the European countries. People loved the ease of playing a Baccarat game without worrying about any kind of rule and strategy. The game traveled to several other places and got different names like ‘Punto Banco’ and ‘American Baccarat’. All was going great for the game but there still was a section of the world who were not familiar with the game. These places were countries that didn’t allow gambling within the country. However, the game soon found the right platform to enter such countries – online casinos.

Online casinos were first seen in the early 2000s and since then have captured the internet by providing casino games regardless of continental boundaries. India is a country that has always been deprived of playing a casino game on land. No state other than Goa, Sikkim, and Daman is allowed to open land-based casinos legally. It is not possible for a country with more than a billion people to visit these land casinos at all times. Hence, online casinos serve as the best possible way for the Indians to get their hands on Baccarat gaming.

Today, India is blessed with several online casinos that provide Baccarat as one of their primary games to try out. Here are the elements of the game that you need to know before you place your first bet on the game.

The elements of the Baccarat game

Yes, Baccarat game is a very simple game that can be played with just a few decks of cards, two players on the board and betting options. The game still consists of various elements that only a Baccarat player would understand. Thus, if you want to enjoy the game in full swing, you must learn about all the following elements well before playing a game for real money.

  • The commission box – If the banker wins a bet, then, the dealer gets to keep a 5% commission on the winning money. If you look closely at the Baccarat table, you will find that there is a long numbered rectangle just beside the bank. That is called the commission box and helps to keep track of all the commissions. Every number inside the box resembles a player. In other games, you might find circles placed next to every betting area.
  • The dealer – The dealer has to stand at the center of the table so that he can reach every player. The game initiates when he starts dealing the cards.
  • The betting areas – Look closely at the Baccarat game felt tabletop and you will find that above every individual player’s number, three-bet boxes are present – Banker, Player, and Tie.
  • Banker bet – A banker bet is when you place a bet stating that the banker will win the game.
  • Player bet – Placing a player bet indicates that you will win the reward if the player has a higher total value card.
  • Tie bet – This is a high payout bet where you place a bet when you think that both the banker and the player will have an equal total value of cards. The payout of this bet is low in comparison to other bets and therefore experts recommend not placing a bet in the Tie box.
  • Game table – Depending on the dealer’s area and Baccarat version, 7 to 14 seats are present in a Baccarat table. Two hands of cards are dealt (the banker hand and the player hand) irrespective of the number of players present at the table. Every player has their own betting area, so they don’t get their own cards.

The gameplay of Baccarat

Playing a game of Baccarat requires the player to know the flow of the game. That is all! There are no specific rules that one needs to learn or eligibility criteria to be fulfilled. Place a bet before the start of the game and wait for your luck to show your destiny. Below are the steps in which the game is conducted online/offline.

  • You can place your bet on one of the three hands – The banker’s hand, the player’s hand or a tie. If your bet is similar to the outcome of a hand, then you win.
  • The Baccarat game initiates when the dealer deals two cards to both the banker and the player. Based on the circumstances, one or both of them will receive a third card. The banker and the player cannot decide whether or not they want a third card. If you are playing a Baccarat game online, then the third card will be dealt with by the software whenever necessary.
  • A Baccarat game is played with standard decks (usually 6 or 8) of 52 cards. 16 cards from the end of the shoe, a cut card is placed which is drawn to signal the shoe’s last hand.
  • The dealer then deals two-card hand to the banker and player one card at a time. The cards are dealt with by starting with the player. These hands are the only dealt hands in the game and all the wagers on the Baccarat game table depend on the outcome of these hands.
  • After this, the total hand numbers are compared and it is determined whether the player should be dealt an extra card or not depending on specific drawing rules. It is also determined whether the banker should get a third card or not depending on the third card value of the player.
  • The final outcome is determined by comparing the totals.

The design of a Baccarat table

Just like the gameplay and the rules that make the game, the design of a Baccarat table is also clean and simple. As you know, the game is not played between other players on the table. It is only between the dealer/banker and the individual player who is placing bets. Therefore, a Baccarat table has divided spaces for different players on the table. None of the two spaces needs to interact with each other.

The shape of a Baccarat table is usually semi-circle. On the center of which sits the dealer who conducts the game. This is the place where the dealer deals the cards in two different sections with the name Banker and Player. The dealer’s place is surrounded by the private spaces of all other players on the board. Each private space has several boxes printed on the board. The boxes are namely – Banker, Player, and Tie. The player can place his bet amount in the box he prefers.

The online Baccarat table is even simpler to understand. The elements that it consists of are similar to the classic game with a few effective differences. The difference between the two tables is seen in placing the bet. The online table has a separate option near the player’s name where you can select the amount you want to place as your bet. Moreover, the infinite creativity supported by the internet enables the creators to design attractive tables for this attractive game.

How to place bets in Baccarat online

Now that you know all the benefits of playing Baccarat online, you surely must be looking for the process of placing a bet in the online game and start playing. Don’t worry! We are here to help you with it.

Placing a bet is an easy task if you are playing the game at a top-notch online casino. How to find a top-notch casino?

  • Further, a good online casino always provides region-specific payment methods for depositing and withdrawing money from the casino account.
  • A good online casino always has an active customer support team to resolve issues faced by the players. One should not judge a casino to be bad if he/she faces a problem. No casino is perfect and a small problem may arise any time of your journey. The judgment scale should be the time it takes to resolve your problem.

If you are taking care of the above-mentioned points before choosing a casino for yourself, you can be sure of having a top-notch gambling experience.

To place a bet in an online Baccarat game follow the below-given steps:

  • Choose the payment options you want to use for the transaction.
  • Choose the currency you will be using for the deposit and withdrawal.
  • Fill in the details of your payment method as required by the casino.
  • Choose the amount you want to deposit to your casino account.
  • Now that you have deposited the money to your account, find the Baccarat game you want to play.
  • Select the amount you want to bet in the game and then choose to pay for it via your deposited money.
  • Your bet will be placed and you can now play the game with ease.

However, placing a bet in the game can be tricky if you don’t know the probability of the possible outcomes. A game of Baccarat may be played with 6-9 decks of cards depending on the variant you are playing. Hence, baccarat odds are the best way to learn about the probability you will be dealing with.
title: Baccarat
